source_context: Three nested concentric circles showing a subset containment model. Outer largest circle labeled the Real. Middle circle inside it labeled the Actual. Inner smallest circle labeled the Empirical. One arrow points from the outer circle inward to the center. Flat minimal academic style, navy and teal colors, no shadows.
communicative_intent: Stratified ontology of critical realism: the Real contains the Actual contains the Empirical.
